2.1.0.note: Baseline established at v2.1.0 — metrics to be populated after first eval run

2.2.0.note: Self-evolution infrastructure removed (v2.2.0 was over-optimized). Core pipeline unchanged.

changes: Removed Self-Evolution Protocol (TLSE Loop 3) from SKILL.md — over-optimized for conversational AI context
Removed learnings/knowledge-base.json, pattern-library.json, creator-vnext.json — redundant copies of domain knowledge already encoded in agent files
Corrected SMM level from 5 to 3 (no production validation data exists)
Kept regression baseline section (L3.5) as lightweight version-upgrade gate
Added inter-agent handoff protocol with structured summaries
Added fallback table for all agents
Strengthened SKILL.md with explicit file loading protocol
Win Rate formula: added multiplicative floor
Strengthened Delivery Agent with quality checks
